filings.ai_summary: Strategy Inc. adopted a "Digital Credit Capital Framework" to strengthen preferred securities, enhance liquidity, and preserve Bitcoin exposure.
The company amended its Variable‑Rate Series A Perpetual Stretch Preferred Stock to pay semi‑monthly dividends beginning July 15 2026, as part of a $21 billion at‑the‑market offering.

filings.summary: Bylaw / charter change; Other material update
filings.ai_summary: Strategy Inc amended its Variable Rate Series A Perpetual Stretch Preferred Stock to pay dividends twice monthly, effective June 30, 2026, and declared a semi‑monthly cash dividend.
Strategy Inc disclosed June ATM sales totaling $209 million, purchased 846,842 BTC for $75.7 billion, and reported a $1.1 billion USD reserve.

At its June 8, 2026 annual meeting, Strategy Inc. elected eight directors, re‑appointed KPMG, approved non‑binding executive pay, ratified an amendment to its 8% preferred stock, and changed dividend timing for its Variable‑Rate Stretch preferred shares.
Strategy Inc's shareholders approved changing dividend payments for its Variable Rate Series A Perpetual Stretch Preferred Stock (STRC) from monthly to semi-monthly.
Strategy Inc sold common stock for $181 million, acquired 1,550 bitcoins for $101.3 million, and holds a $1 billion USD reserve.
Strategy Inc filed additional proxy materials, including an X (Twitter) thread, for its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders.
Strategy Inc. is proposing a semi-monthly dividend to increase liquidity and price stability for shareholders.
Strategy Inc. posted a video proposing to double dividend frequency, with polls closing in early June for shareholder approval.
Strategy Inc is proposing to move dividend payments from monthly to semi-monthly, and shareholders should vote.
Strategy Inc filed additional proxy materials related to its 2026 Annual Meeting, including a reply to a social media comment about meeting proposals.
Strategy Inc sold 801,994 shares of common stock for $128.3 million, sold 32 bitcoins for $2.5 million, and declared cash dividends on its preferred stocks.
Strategy Inc is soliciting shareholder votes for its 2026 Annual Meeting, including a proposal for semi-monthly dividends.
Strategy Inc. is asking shareholders to vote on increasing dividend frequency from monthly to twice monthly for improved stability and liquidity.
Strategy Inc. is proposing to increase its dividend payment frequency from monthly to twice monthly.
Strategy Inc is soliciting votes to change preferred stock dividend payments from monthly to semi-monthly.
Strategy Inc disclosed it made no ATM share sales or bitcoin purchases in May, now holds 843,738 BTC bought for $63.87 billion, has an $871 million USD reserve, and issued a capital‑structure update.

Strategy Inc. hired Alliance Advisors to solicit proxy votes for Proposal 5 (paying a $10,000 base fee plus per‑call/text and vote fees) and announced a website update proposing semi‑monthly dividends on its STRC preferred stock.

Strategy Inc. filed a definitive proxy statement announcing its June 8, 2026 shareholder vote to change Stretch Preferred’s dividend from monthly to semi‑monthly, with the record date April 17 and materials available online.
Strategy Inc filed a definitive proxy statement for its 2026 annual meeting, urging shareholders to vote on moving Stretch Preferred dividends from monthly to semi‑monthly.
Strategy Inc filed a definitive proxy statement for its 2026 annual meeting (record date April 17, 2026), making materials available online and requiring proxy cards for voting.
Strategy Inc filed a definitive proxy statement for its 2026 annual meeting (record date April 17, 2026), directing shareholders to review the materials online.
Strategy Inc disclosed that in the week ending May 17 it sold 19.5 million STRC preferred shares for $1.95 billion and used the proceeds to buy 843,738 BTC at an average $63.87 per coin.

Alphabet Inc. is offering 150 million Series A Depositary Shares, each representing a 1/20th interest in its Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock.
Alphabet Inc. is offering $15 billion of its Class A and Class C stock.
Alphabet Inc. completed a public offering of ¥576.9 billion in Japanese yen-denominated senior notes.
Alphabet Inc. is offering various yen-denominated notes with different interest rates and maturity dates.
Alphabet Inc. completed offerings of €9 billion in euro notes and C$9.5 billion in Canadian dollar notes on May 11, 2026.
Alphabet Inc. is offering yen-denominated notes with various maturity dates and interest rates.
